faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Got questions?
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions.

q1.question: Is the website really delivered in 6 hours?
q1.answer: Yes. Our ready-made templates and optimized workflow allow us to deliver your finished website within 6 hours of receiving your content.

q2.question: What do I need to provide?
q2.answer: After ordering, you'll receive a simple intake form where you can provide your business name, logo, text content, images, and brand colors. The more complete the form, the faster we can deliver.

q3.question: What technologies do you use?
q3.answer: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and Vercel hosting — modern, fast, and secure solutions.

q4.question: Can I get changes after delivery?
q4.answer: Yes, every plan includes one round of revisions after delivery. Additional changes are available through our maintenance packages.

q5.question: Do you offer maintenance?
q5.answer: Yes, starting at 19,000 HUF/month for hosting, security updates, and backups. Advanced support is available at 49,000 HUF/month.

q6.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q6.answer: Bank transfer and online payment (Stripe). 50% is due upfront with the order, and 50% upon delivery.
